utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Count the number of items in the required format — there are 5: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Step 2: Check if each appears in the final coverage plan — all 5 items are present. Step 3: Verify if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (monthly and annual) and plan details — fully specified. 
- property_coverage: Includes home/contents insurance with costs (monthly and annual) and plan details — fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: Includes travel insurance with costs (monthly and annual) and plan details — fully specified. 
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with explicit monthly costs and total monthly/annual cost without optional add-on — fully specified. 
- total_budget: Includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown with and without optional coverage — fully specified. Step 4: Conclusion — all 5/5 items are present and fully detailed.
